hero_prompt_inject: A top-down flat-lay product photo of a Delicut 900ml main meal tray sitting on a clean light grey surface. The tray has a rounded-square shape with a warm beige molded pulp outer body and a clear PET lid through which a fresh Mediterranean chickpeas salad with shrimp and couscous is visible. A bold red (#FF3F1F) adhesive label band stretches across the center of the lid, printed with the white '/delicut/' logo and a white nutritional info panel, giving it a modern, premium healthy-food brand identity.

items.visual_description: Two rectangular product labels designed for food packaging. Label 1 is a landscape-oriented square label with a clean white/light grey background, featuring structured typographic layout with nutritional information, barcode, and product name. Label 2 is a portrait-oriented rectangular label, taller than wide, with the same minimal aesthetic but rotated text layout to accommodate a narrow container format such as a bottle or cylindrical package. Both labels are flat, printed sticker-style labels with no visible texture or embossing.
items.colors: Both labels use a monochromatic greyscale palette — predominantly white/off-white background with black typography. No brand accent colors (#043F12, #FF3F1F, #EA5D29, or #F9F4ED) are visibly applied as fills or highlights; the design relies entirely on black ink on a light neutral base, consistent with a clean, clinical food-labeling system.
items.material: Appears to be a matte white self-adhesive sticker label, likely paper-based or semi-gloss thermal label stock suitable for food packaging environments, possibly water-resistant given UAE climate and meal delivery use case.
items.branding_position: The '/delicut/' wordmark logo is prominently placed in the top-left area of both labels in large, bold, condensed typeface. On Label 1 it sits in the upper-left with 'delicut.ae' URL beside it top-right. On Label 2 the logo is top-centered in the same bold style.
items.label_style: Minimalist, utilitarian typographic design using a bold grotesque/sans-serif typeface. Label 1 (60mm x 60mm) is horizontal and displays: brand logo, website, product name ('Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad'), meal category ('Snacks', 'Small Meal'), macronutrient breakdown (kcal 560, pro 29, carbs 32, fat 36), best before date, customer name, order ID, and a barcode. Label 2 (45mm x 65mm) is vertical and contains the same data fields rotated 90 degrees: brand logo, product name ('Apple Cinnamon Muffin'), origin ('America'), kcal (328), macros (pro 4, carbs 53, fat 11), meal type ('Snack'), best before date, website, order code, and barcode. Both use hierarchical type sizing to distinguish product name, macros, and metadata.
items.prompt_inject: Two minimalist food packaging labels from the brand Delicut, printed in crisp black typography on a clean white matte sticker stock. Label 1 is a 60x60mm square lying flat on a light surface, showing bold product name text, a macro nutrition grid, and a barcode in the bottom-right corner. Label 2 is a taller 45x65mm portrait rectangle with all information rotated vertically, designed to wrap around a slim cylindrical container, with the '/delicut/' logo prominently anchoring the top. Both labels sit naturally on a clean white studio surface under soft diffused lighting, looking precise, functional, and modern.

items.visual_description: The page showcases three types of branded packaging elements: (1) Standard tape — shown as two rectangular sticker/label strips with rounded corners applied horizontally across a white card or box surface, featuring a narrow colored band across the middle; (2) Bag tape — a wide horizontal banner-style tape showing two color variants (red and dark green) with the brand logo, tagline, and a QR code on the right; (3) Round stickers — two circular disc stickers, one in red and one in dark green, both 40mm in diameter, each carrying the '/delicut/' wordmark in white.
items.colors: Dominant colors are Grenade red (#FF3F1F) and Spinach green (#043F12). The standard tape band uses red and green alternating variants. The bag tape appears in both red and green versions. The round stickers use the same two brand colors. White is used for logo text on all colored backgrounds. The cream (#F9F4ED) background is used as the page/card surface on the standard tape mockup.
items.material: Standard tape appears to be a self-adhesive paper or vinyl label/sticker strip. Bag tape appears to be printed adhesive sealing tape or a wide label tape. Round stickers appear to be die-cut circular self-adhesive vinyl or paper stickers.
items.branding_position: On the standard tape, the '/delicut/' wordmark appears on the left side of the colored band, with 'delicut.ae' in smaller text beside it. On the bag tape, the large '/delicut/' wordmark dominates the left-center, with 'gourmet everyday' tagline to the right of the slash, and a QR code at the far right. On the round stickers, '/delicut/' is centered on the circular face.
items.label_style: The font used is a bold, modern sans-serif for the '/delicut/' wordmark with forward slashes flanking the brand name. The bag tape additionally carries a secondary line reading 'gourmet everyday' in a smaller, lighter weight sans-serif. The standard tape repeats the logo and website URL in a compact horizontal strip. The QR code on the bag tape links to a digital destination. Layout is minimal, clean, and typographically driven with no illustrative elements.
items.dimensions_noted: Standard tape band: 20mm height. Bag tape: 222mm width × 45mm height (combined for both color variants shown stacked). Round stickers: 40mm diameter each.
items.prompt_inject: A flat-lay product shot of Delicut branded packaging stickers and tape strips arranged on a clean white surface. Two bold circular stickers sit side by side — one vivid red and one deep forest green — each 40mm across with the white '/delicut/' wordmark centered on them. Beside them lie wide horizontal adhesive tape strips in matching red and green, stamped with the large '/delicut/' logo, a small 'gourmet everyday' tagline, and a QR code on the right end. The materials look like glossy die-cut vinyl stickers and matte printed sealing tape, shot under soft diffused studio lighting.

items.visual_description: A small square-shaped food tray approximately 400ml in capacity, with rounded corners and a shallow depth. The tray has a clear transparent lid sealed over a metallic silver/aluminium-toned base container. The tray is compact and squat, sitting flat, with visible salad contents (Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad with greens and red elements) visible through the transparent lid. The overall form factor is a standard meal-prep portion tray with a professional, clean silhouette.
items.colors: The tray body is silver/metallic aluminium. The lid is clear transparent plastic. The label is predominantly white/cream (#F9F4ED) background with black typography. A bold Spinach green (#043F12) horizontal band runs across the middle of the label and extends to a wraparound strip around the tray edge, featuring the '/delicut/' wordmark and 'delicut.ae' URL in white. No use of Grenade red or Pumpkin orange is visible in this label variant.
items.material: The tray base appears to be aluminium or metallic food-grade material. The lid is clear rigid plastic (likely PET). The label is a printed paper or matte adhesive sticker applied to the lid surface.
items.branding_position: The Delicut label is centered on the top lid of the tray, occupying most of the lid surface. The '/delicut/' logo appears prominently at the top of the label in bold black serif-style slash typography. A green (#043F12) banner strip also wraps around the tray sides, repeating the '/d' logo mark and 'delicut.ae' URL.
items.label_style: The label uses a clean, minimal layout on a cream/white background. The '/delicut/' brand name is set in a bold, modern sans-serif font with forward-slash characters flanking it. Below the logo sits the meal name 'Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad' in medium-weight sans-serif. Smaller text fields display category ('Snacks'), meal size ('Small Meal'), and a macro nutrition grid showing kcal (560), protein (29), carbs (32), and fat (36). Additional fields include best-before date (01.10.2023), a barcode (1234567890123), a meal code (1C/1D1), and a personalisation line reading 'Freshly Made for Javi Tortosa Mateu 00014212'. The layout is structured in a grid hierarchy from brand to meal name to nutrition data.
items.dimensions_noted: A measurement annotation of '62 mm' is visible above the tray in the guide, indicating the label or tray lid width measurement.
items.prompt_inject: A small square aluminium meal tray with rounded corners and a clear plastic lid, neatly sealed and sitting flat on a clean surface. The lid features a crisp white adhesive label with the '/delicut/' brand in bold black type and a deep spinach-green (#043F12) banner wrapping around the tray sides. Inside, a vibrant Mediterranean chickpeas salad with green leaves and red accents is faintly visible through the transparent lid, giving the pack a fresh, healthy, and premium ready-meal aesthetic.

items.visual_description: A small rectangular food tray with rounded corners, approximately 400ml capacity. The tray body is wrapped in a bold red sleeve and features a clear frosted plastic lid that sits snugly on top. The overall form factor is compact and squat — a wide, shallow container suitable for a single meal portion. The base tray appears to be a white or cream-colored plastic container beneath the red sleeve wrap.
items.colors: Dominant colors are Grenade red (#FF3F1F) on the outer sleeve wrap, white/cream on the plastic tray body and lid, and Spinach green (#043F12) on the vertical band/strap label running across the center. White typography appears on the red sleeve.
items.material: Clear frosted plastic lid, white plastic tray body, paper/cardboard sleeve wrap with a paper belly band label
items.branding_position: The Delicut brand name 'delicut' appears in large bold white typography on the red sleeve wrapping the lower half of the tray. A vertical green belly band runs across the center of the tray, displaying 'delicut.ae /delicut' in white text, acting as a secondary branding and nutrition/info label strip.
items.label_style: The main sleeve uses oversized, bold sans-serif white lettering spelling 'delicut' across a solid Grenade red background — high contrast and minimal. The green vertical belly band is narrow and contains the website URL 'delicut.ae', the social handle '/delicut', and a nutrition facts panel or meal information printed in small white text. A barcode or QR code area is also visible on the top label section.
items.dimensions_noted: 400ml capacity as noted in the slide title; no explicit dimension measurements printed visibly on the packaging in the image
items.prompt_inject: A compact rectangular 400ml meal prep tray with rounded corners, wrapped in a vivid red paper sleeve boldly printed with 'delicut' in oversized white sans-serif type, sealed with a clear frosted plastic lid. A narrow dark green vertical belly band crosses the center of the tray, printed with the website and nutritional details in small white text. The product sits naturally on a clean white surface under soft studio lighting, conveying a fresh, modern healthy-eating brand aesthetic.

items.visual_description: A square-ish rounded-corner meal tray approximately 900ml in volume, viewed from directly above in a flat-lay orientation. The tray has a shallow beige/tan matte outer container made of what appears to be recycled pulp or kraft-style material. A clear transparent plastic lid seals the top, through which the meal contents — Mediterranean chickpeas salad with shrimp, roasted zucchini, and couscous — are fully visible. The tray has a compact, slightly deep form factor with smooth curved corners and a clean, modern silhouette.
items.colors: Dominant outer tray color is warm beige/tan (natural kraft tone). The transparent lid reveals the colorful meal inside. The label features a bold Grenade red (#FF3F1F) background banner running horizontally across the center of the lid, with white text for the brand name and product details. A secondary white label panel sits within the red band, carrying nutritional information in black and dark grey text.
items.material: Outer tray appears to be molded recycled paper pulp or bagasse (compostable/eco-friendly material). The lid is a clear rigid plastic (likely PET), and the label is a printed adhesive sticker applied directly across the lid surface.
items.branding_position: The Delicut logo and product label are positioned as a horizontal band across the center of the transparent lid. The logo '/delicut/' appears in bold white text on the red (#FF3F1F) background strip, visible multiple times across the label band — once prominently in the center-left and once repeated to the right, suggesting a wraparound label design.
items.label_style: The label uses a bold sans-serif typeface for the '/delicut/' wordmark in white on a red background. Below the logo, the product name 'Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad' is printed in smaller black text on a white sub-panel. The label also displays meal category ('Snacks'), portion size ('Small Meal'), macronutrient values (kcal: 560, pro: 29, carbs: 32, fat: 36), a best-before date (01.10.2023), a barcode, customer name ('Freshly Made for Javi Tortosa Mateu'), and a customer ID ('00014212'). Layout is structured and data-dense but clean.
items.dimensions_noted: A measurement annotation of '110 mm' is overlaid on the image indicating the width of the label or lid area across the top portion of the tray.
items.prompt_inject: A top-down flat-lay product photo of a Delicut 900ml main meal tray sitting on a clean light grey surface. The tray has a rounded-square shape with a warm beige molded pulp outer body and a clear PET lid through which a fresh Mediterranean chickpeas salad with shrimp and couscous is visible. A bold red (#FF3F1F) adhesive label band stretches across the center of the lid, printed with the white '/delicut/' logo and a white nutritional info panel, giving it a modern, premium healthy-food brand identity.

items.visual_description: A square-ish, rounded-corner food container tray with a transparent clear plastic lid. The tray body is wrapped in a bold dark green sleeve/label covering the lower two-thirds of the container. A vertical orange-red band label wraps around the container like a belly band, crossing both the lid and the body. The container has a slightly elevated clear lid with a flat rim. The overall form is compact and sturdy, resembling a premium meal prep container.
items.colors: Dominant body color is Spinach Green (#043F12) on the sleeve wrap. The lid and tray base appear in a warm Cream/beige tone (#F9F4ED). The vertical belly band is Grenade Red (#FF3F1F). White is used for the brand wordmark on the green sleeve. Brand palette usage is highly consistent across all elements.
items.material: The tray body appears to be rigid plastic or paperboard composite with a printed sleeve. The lid appears to be transparent polypropylene (PP) plastic. The belly band appears to be a printed paper or coated card stock wrap.
items.branding_position: The Delicut wordmark '/delicut/' appears prominently in large white bold type on the green lower sleeve wrapping the tray body. The brand name also repeats in smaller print along the vertical red belly band, which runs centrally from the lid down to the base.
items.label_style: The primary sleeve label uses a large, bold sans-serif white font for '/delicut/' branding with a forward slash prefix, consistent with the brand's typographic identity. The vertical red belly band features the '/delicut/' name repeated in white at multiple scales, and includes a secondary nutritional/product information sticker on the front face showing calorie count (560 kcal), macros (29g), barcode, and dish name — likely 'Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad' — in a clean, minimal label format.
items.dimensions_noted: 900 ml as indicated in the slide title. No explicit dimensional measurements visible on the product itself, but the container appears approximately 18–20cm square based on proportions.
items.prompt_inject: A premium 900ml square meal prep container with rounded corners, featuring a bold spinach-green printed sleeve wrap on the lower body bearing the '/delicut/' brand name in large white bold sans-serif type. A vertical red-orange belly band crosses the container from lid to base, repeating the brand name and holding a small nutritional info sticker. The container has a warm cream-toned transparent lid, sits flat on a clean white surface, and conveys a fresh, modern healthy meal brand aesthetic.

items.visual_description: A large square meal tray with rounded corners, approximately 1200ml capacity. The tray has a beige/taupe colored base made of what appears to be recycled or compostable material. It is topped with a clear transparent plastic lid allowing full visibility of the meal contents inside — which include a Mediterranean chickpea salad with couscous, greens, a sauce pot, and colorful vegetables. The tray has a sturdy, wide-format form factor with a flat bottom.
items.colors: Dominant tray color is warm beige/taupe. The clear lid reveals colorful food contents — yellows, greens, reds. The label band across the middle uses the brand's Spinach green (#043F12) as a horizontal stripe. The sticker label itself is white/cream (#F9F4ED) background with black typography. Brand logo appears in both white-on-green and black-on-white formats.
items.material: Tray base appears to be moulded pulp or recycled cardboard-composite material in a beige tone, suggesting eco-friendly or compostable packaging. The lid is a rigid clear plastic (likely PET), and the label band appears to be a printed paper or plastic wrap around the tray's midsection.
items.branding_position: The Delicut branding appears in two locations: (1) a rectangular white sticker label adhered to the top-center of the clear lid, and (2) a green horizontal band wrapping around the mid-section of the tray featuring '/delicut/' and 'delicut.ae' repeated in white text across the full width.
items.label_style: The lid sticker label is white/cream with clean sans-serif typography. It features the '/delicut/' logo prominently at the top left, the website 'delicut.ae' to the right, followed by the meal name 'Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad', category tag 'Snacks', meal size 'Small Meal', and macro nutritional breakdown in bold large numerals — kcal: 560, pro: 29, carbs: 32, fat: 36. It also includes a 'Best before' date, a barcode, a 'Freshly Made for' customer name field, and an order ID. The band label repeats '/delicut/' and 'delicut.ae' in white italic-style slash-bracket brand font on a Spinach green (#043F12) background.
items.dimensions_noted: 110 mm width indicator is annotated in the image with a measurement line across the base of the tray
items.prompt_inject: A large square eco-friendly meal prep tray with softly rounded corners, a warm beige moulded pulp base, and a crystal-clear rigid plastic lid revealing a vibrant Mediterranean chickpea salad with golden couscous, crisp green snap peas, a white sauce pot, and colourful toppings. A bold Spinach green band wraps the tray's midsection with white '/delicut/' branding repeated across it, while a clean white nutrition sticker sits centered on the lid displaying macros and meal details in sharp sans-serif type. The tray sits flat on a light neutral surface, shot from directly above in soft studio lighting, with the label facing forward.

items.visual_description: A large square-rounded meal tray with a clear plastic lid that has a warm cream/beige tint. The container body is wrapped with a bold red sleeve featuring oversized white 'delicut' lettering in a large chunky sans-serif typeface. A vertical green band/strap wraps around the center of the container perpendicular to the red sleeve, bearing the '/delicut/' logo and 'delicut.ae' URL in white text. A white nutrition/meal label is affixed to the top lid surface. The tray has soft rounded corners and a sturdy, stackable form factor.
items.colors: Dominant body color is #FF3F1F (Grenade red) for the sleeve wrap. White is used for the oversized brand typography on the sleeve. The vertical band is #043F12 (Spinach green) with white text. The lid is translucent with a warm cream/beige (#F9F4ED) tint. The overall palette aligns precisely with Delicut's brand color system.
items.material: The tray body appears to be rigid food-grade plastic or paperboard composite. The lid is clear hard plastic (likely PET or PP). The branding elements are printed sleeves/wraps — a paper or plastic sleeve in red and a separate green paper band cinching the container.
items.branding_position: The '/delicut/' brand name appears in two locations: (1) as oversized white text across the full circumference of the red body sleeve, and (2) vertically along the green center band strap that runs top-to-bottom across the lid and body.
items.label_style: The main nutrition label is a white rectangular sticker placed on the top of the clear lid, printed in small black text. It displays the meal name ('Mediterranean Chicken Salad'), macros (Calories: 560, Protein: 29g, Carbs: 32g, Fat: 36g), a barcode, and preparation/brand notes. The layout is clean and data-dense with a structured grid of nutritional values. The '/delicut/' wordmark appears in the top-left of the label in brand style.
items.dimensions_noted: 1200 ml capacity as noted in the section heading. No explicit physical dimension measurements (cm/mm) are visible on the packaging itself.
items.prompt_inject: A large square meal prep container with softly rounded corners, its lower body wrapped in a vivid red sleeve printed with oversized white 'delicut' lettering, cinched by a vertical dark spinach-green paper band bearing the '/delicut/' logo in white. The container is topped with a translucent cream-tinted hard plastic lid on which a small white nutrition label is affixed. The tray sits on a clean light surface, photographed at a slight elevated angle, evoking a premium healthy meal delivery brand.

items.visual_description: A medium-sized round paper snack tub/cup with a wide cylindrical body that tapers slightly toward the base. The container has a clear plastic snap-on lid and is constructed from natural kraft brown paperboard. A vertical orange-red brand ribbon/band runs over the top of the lid and down the front of the container, and a white rectangular product label is affixed to the front face of the tub.
items.colors: Dominant container color is natural kraft brown. The vertical brand band uses Grenade Red (#FF3F1F), which is a core Delicut brand color. The product label is white with black text. The lid is a translucent/clear plastic.
items.material: Kraft paperboard for the main tub body, clear plastic for the snap-on lid, paper for the product label and brand band
items.branding_position: The Delicut logo appears on a vertical red ribbon/band that runs centrally over the lid and down the front and back of the container. The '/delicut/' wordmark also appears on the white product label on the front of the tub.
items.label_style: The white rectangular label features a clean, modern sans-serif typeface. It displays the product name ('Apple Cinnamon Muffin') prominently, followed by cuisine origin ('America'), meal category ('Snack'), and a macro nutrition breakdown (kcal: 328, pro: 4, carbs: 53, fat: 11). It also includes best-before date, website (delicut.ae), a barcode, a customer name ('Freshly Made for J. Tortosa Mateu'), a customer ID (00014212), and a meal code (1C/1D1). Layout is structured and information-dense but well-organized.
items.dimensions_noted: 70 mm height indicated by a measurement annotation on the right side of the image
items.prompt_inject: A medium round kraft paper snack tub with a clear plastic snap-on lid, sitting upright on a clean surface. A bold red vertical band bearing the '/delicut/' logo wraps over the lid and down the front of the natural brown paperboard container. A crisp white product label on the front displays 'Apple Cinnamon Muffin' in clean sans-serif typography alongside nutrition macros and a barcode, giving the packaging a modern, health-focused premium feel.

items.visual_description: A large 16oz paper cup container with a wide cylindrical body that tapers slightly toward the base, topped with a clear semi-transparent plastic lid. The cup body is off-white/cream in color with a smooth matte paper surface. It has a substantial, sturdy form factor typical of large snack or deli-style paper tubs.
items.colors: Primary container color is off-white/cream (#F9F4ED-adjacent). The label features a bold red-orange vertical stripe (#FF3F1F Grenade red) carrying the '/delicut.' wordmark in white. The main product info label is white/cream with black typography. Brand red accent stripe is prominently used for logo placement.
items.material: Food-grade paper/cardboard composite for the cup body with a clear plastic snap-on lid, consistent with standard hot/cold paper food containers used in meal prep packaging.
items.branding_position: The Delicut logo appears on a vertical red-orange stripe label that runs vertically down the front center of the cup, with '/delicut.' text rotated 90 degrees. A second partial stripe is visible at the bottom front of the cup.
items.label_style: Two-part label system: (1) a narrow vertical red-orange banner with white '/delicut.' wordmark in a bold sans-serif font running top to bottom; (2) a rectangular white product info label showing meal name 'Apple Cinnamon Muffin', origin 'America', category 'Snack', macros (kcal 328, pro 4, carbs 53, fat 11), best-before date, website 'delicut.ae', customer name, ID number, and a barcode. Typography is clean, minimal, sans-serif throughout.
items.dimensions_noted: 100mm height indicated by a measurement bracket on the right side of the image.
items.prompt_inject: A large 16oz off-white matte paper snack tub with a clear plastic lid, sitting upright on a clean surface. A bold vertical red-orange stripe runs down the front center of the cup bearing the white '/delicut.' logo in rotated sans-serif text, paired with a clean white rectangular nutrition label showing product details and a barcode. The container has a sturdy cylindrical shape with a slight taper, evoking fresh, premium meal-prep packaging in a minimal, modern health food aesthetic.

items.visual_description: A glass amber bottle photographed from directly above, showing a rounded dome-shaped bottle cap/top. The bottle is transparent amber/golden in color with a ridged black metal screw cap. The bottle has a classic round silhouette with a smooth cylindrical body visible below the cap. The overall form is compact and artisanal-looking.
items.colors: Dominant bottle color is warm amber/golden yellow. The cap sticker uses Grenade red (#FF3F1F / close approximation, a strong orange-red tone) as background with white text for the Delicut wordmark. The background of the photo is a neutral warm beige/cream.
items.material: Glass bottle body with a ridged black metal screw-top cap. The label is a circular adhesive sticker applied directly on top of the cap.
items.branding_position: The Delicut brand logo is centered on a circular sticker placed directly on the flat top surface of the bottle cap, fully visible from an overhead view.
items.label_style: Circular sticker with a solid orange-red background. The wordmark '/delicut/' is written in lowercase white sans-serif font with forward slashes flanking the brand name on both sides, centered in the sticker. The design is minimal with no additional information — purely brand identification.
items.prompt_inject: A top-down studio flat-lay shot of a rounded amber glass bottle with a ridged black metal screw cap, sealed with a bold circular orange-red sticker bearing the white lowercase wordmark '/delicut/' centered on the cap. The warm golden transparency of the bottle glows against a soft cream-beige surface, casting a long diagonal shadow. The composition is clean and minimalist, evoking a premium artisanal healthy drink brand.

items.visual_description: A clear transparent cylindrical plastic snack container/tub with a flat lid. The container is wide-mouthed and squat in form, filled with visible colorful snack items including what appear to be fruit and vegetable pieces in orange, green, and yellow tones. A wraparound label is applied to the exterior of the tub, with a smaller branded tab extending above and below the container at the front.
items.colors: Dominant colors include the clear/transparent plastic body, white label background, and a vivid red-orange (#FF3F1F Grenade red) accent used on the top and bottom branded tabs. Black is used for all text and the barcode. The Delicut logo tab uses the brand's Grenade red prominently.
items.material: Clear transparent PET or polypropylene plastic cylindrical container with a snap-fit or press-fit lid. The label appears to be a matte or semi-gloss white paper or polypropylene label stock.
items.branding_position: The Delicut '/delicut/' wordmark appears vertically on the left side of the wraparound label. A branded red-orange tab with the stylized 't/' logo icon appears at the top center of the container, protruding above the lid. A second smaller branded tab appears at the bottom center below the container base.
items.label_style: The label is a clean, modern white wraparound design with a minimal typographic layout. Font is a bold sans-serif (likely a grotesque typeface). The label carries: product name ('Apple Cinnamon Muffin'), cuisine origin ('America'), meal category ('Snack'), macro nutritional information (kcal 328, pro 4, carbs 53, fat 11), best before date (01.10.2023), website (delicut.ae), a barcode (1234567890123), meal plan code (1C/101), and a personalized 'Freshly Made for' customer name and ID (J. Tortosa Mateu, 00014212). The '/delicut/' logotype is printed vertically in large bold italic type on the left edge.
items.dimensions_noted: 55 mm height indicated by a dimension callout on the right side of the image.
items.prompt_inject: A clear cylindrical plastic snack tub with a transparent body revealing colorful chopped fruit and vegetable pieces inside, sitting on a clean neutral surface. A crisp white wraparound label hugs the container with bold sans-serif text showing nutritional info and a red-orange branded tab protruding above the lid featuring the Delicut 't/' icon. The overall look is fresh, minimal, and clinical — like a premium healthy grab-and-go snack from a modern UAE meal prep brand.

items.visual_description: A cylindrical kraft paper soup container with a matching kraft paper lid. The container is tall and bucket-shaped with a slightly tapered form. It features a vertical label strip in Grenade red running from top to bottom over the front, overlaid with a white rectangular product information label in the center. The container has a natural, eco-friendly brown paper texture throughout.
items.colors: Dominant container color is natural kraft brown. The vertical band label uses Grenade red (#FF3F1F) as background with white text reading 'delicut'. The central product info label is white with black typography. Brand accent color Grenade red is the primary brand color expression on this packaging.
items.material: Kraft paper / cardboard composite construction for the container body and lid, consistent with eco-friendly food-safe soup containers. The label appears to be a printed adhesive paper label with a matte finish.
items.branding_position: The Delicut brand name appears twice on a vertical red ribbon/band label that runs top to bottom across the front of the container — once near the top reading upward and once near the bottom. The '/delicut/' wordmark also appears prominently on the white center label in bold black typography.
items.label_style: The white center label features a clean, modern sans-serif layout. It prominently displays the '/delicut/' logotype in large bold type, with 'delicut.ae' in small text top-right. Below the logo is the product name 'Mediterranean Chickpeas Salad' in medium-weight type, followed by category tag 'Snacks', meal size 'Small Meal', and a macros breakdown (kcal: 560, pro: 29, carbs: 32, fat: 36). Additional fields include best before date, customer name, order ID, a barcode, and a batch code (1C/1D1). Typography is tight, structured, and data-driven.
items.dimensions_noted: 100 mm height indicated by a vertical dimension line shown to the right of the product image.
items.prompt_inject: A cylindrical kraft brown paper soup container with a fitted kraft lid, standing upright on a clean surface. A bold vertical Grenade red ribbon label wraps front-to-back displaying 'delicut' in white. A white rectangular sticker label centered on the front shows the '/delicut/' logo in bold black, product name, and nutritional stats in a clean sans-serif layout. The container radiates a healthy, eco-conscious, modern meal-prep aesthetic.

items.visual_description: A large rectangular tote-style delivery bag with a structured, boxy silhouette. The bag has a wide base and tapers very slightly toward the top opening. It features two long shoulder-length strap handles. The bag is photographed at a three-quarter angle, revealing both the front face and one side panel. The front carries a large oversized logo print, and the side panel repeats a smaller version of the branding. The bag appears to be a reusable laminated carry bag designed for meal deliveries.
